title: viburnum dilatatum var. litorale
intro: Viburnum dilatatum var. litorale is a variety of the Korean spice viburnum, a flowering plant native to East Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viburnum dilatatum var. litorale include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. The herbal preparations of this plant often involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
